Uses of Class
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.CodecPolicy

Packages that use CodecPolicy
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
 

Uses of CodecPolicy in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection that return CodecPolicy
 CodecPolicy SdpPortManager.getCodecPolicy()
          Get the current CodecPolicy.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection with parameters of type CodecPolicy
 void SdpPortManager.setCodecPolicy(CodecPolicy policy)
          Install the given CodecPolicy.
